title: Dispute
description: Represents a chargeback or retrieval dispute filed by a cardholder or issuing bank against a Braintree transaction.

amount.description: The disputed amount as a decimal string.

currency_iso_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the disputed amount.

reason.description: The reason code or category provided by the card network for the dispute.

received_date.description: Date the dispute was received by Braintree.

reply_by_date.description: Deadline date by which the merchant must respond to the dispute.

transaction_id.description: The identifier of the original transaction that was disputed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the dispute was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the dispute was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.
